'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=MnkkaZ_0CCC6l8c8xSh7EuMccTN_tGDgiVEr0cNy9mo-1774105901-1.0.1.1-isWzxdySVoi3QwtzUs81j2rw_ZnGD477O3rhGg7YrQI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
